notes: Prospectors Plus 4.1.0 - NEW Geodes mode + build sharing. Geodes: a mode for slow dig+shake animation builds (10% dig-speed geode shovels) -- waits out each fill animation instead of false-nudging, confirms digs by the green dig-bar, keeps shaking until the pan is truly empty, with a live dig-delay countdown in the HUD. Ships with a one-click 'v3 geode' preset and two ready-tuned 'Geode Farm' builds. NEW build sharing: Export any build to a file, Import a friend's, and Attach a Roblox-equipment doc (Word/PDF/image) that travels with the build -- click 'Download Roblox build' to get it. Also: a live shake-miss counter, a much smoother shake, a big RAM-leak fix for the OCR trackers, and the app now fully quits when you close it.
